modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a short and minimally polite tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be several noticeable typos and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Email undeliverable error 550.5.1.11 when sending messages

full_description_text:  
Trying to send email but it fails.  
Get undeliverable message with code 550 5.1.11.  
Says address info is outdated.  
Need help fixing this issue.
